purpose: UI image generation manifest for the Gostop demo. These assets support the card art without competing with it.

globalStyleContract.style: Traditional Korean minhwa and ink-wash inspired UI textures on aged hanji paper, quieter and simpler than the card illustrations.
globalStyleContract.centerTreatment: Keep the center empty and calm for labels, icons, or UI text rendered by the game layer.
globalStyleContract.background: Warm aged cream hanji or muted traditional cloth texture, subtle grain, no scenery.
notes: Card illustrations are the visual focus; UI images must recede behind gameplay.
Buttons and panels should be suitable for 9-slice use, with soft edges and a mostly empty middle.
All UI text must be rendered by Unity or the UI layer, never baked into generated images.

items.subject: A simple traditional Korean paper card back pattern, aged cream hanji, muted indigo and vermilion brush motifs, no text, no symbols, no border text.
items.prompt: Traditional Korean minhwa and ink-wash inspired UI texture, quiet aged cream hanji paper, very low contrast, low saturation, handmade ink and mineral-pigment feel. A simple traditional Korean paper card back pattern with muted indigo and vermilion brush motifs, sparse and centered, leaving calm negative space. No text, letters, numbers, seals, symbols, logos, watermarks, border text, modern objects, photorealism, 3D, anime style or flat vector style.

items.subject: A quiet dark green traditional cloth surface with very subtle hanji and fabric texture, low contrast, no objects, no text.
items.prompt: Quiet traditional Korean game table background, dark muted green cloth with subtle hanji and fabric grain, low contrast, low saturation, matte ink-wash mood. Empty surface only, no objects, no scenery, no strong pattern, no bright highlights. No text, letters, numbers, seals, logos, watermarks, modern objects, photorealism, 3D, anime style or flat vector style.

items.subject: A simple aged hanji rectangular UI panel texture with soft ink-wash edge, very low contrast, no text.
items.prompt: Traditional Korean aged hanji UI panel texture, soft ink-wash edge, warm cream paper, very low contrast, low saturation, handmade brush feel. Simple rectangular panel shape with an empty center for UI content and text rendered later, corners and edges gentle enough for 9-slice scaling. No text, letters, numbers, seals, logos, watermarks, decorative scene, modern objects, photorealism, 3D, anime style or flat vector style.

No text, letters, numbers, seals, logos, watermarks, symbols, modern objects, photorealism, 3D, anime style or flat vector style.
